drift_description: PESTLE Economic factor projection assumed LLM API costs would continue declining 40% YoY. CompetitorAlpha's launch of AI PRD generation — using a different LLM provider with 30% lower costs — suggests our cost assumptions may be 15-20% too conservative. Additionally, competitive intensity has increased more than our original PESTLE anticipated.

affected_downstream.impact: Option A (accelerate PRD) assumed competitor gap of 4-6 weeks. New cost data suggests competitor could accelerate further. Sensitivity analysis assumptions changed.
Unit economics assume LLM costs at current rates. If competitor costs are 30% lower, our gross margin projections are optimistic.
Market sizing section references PESTLE economic projections. Drift could affect market size and growth rate claims.

recommended_action: Refresh PESTLE Economic factor with updated LLM pricing data from competitive radar. Re-run sensitivity analysis on PRD acceleration decision. Update pricing analysis gross margin assumptions.
